channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Growing Muslim Community in Hilliard, Ohio Embraces Ramazan and Community Service
item.description: In Hilliard, a calm suburb near Columbus, Ohio, the Muslim community gathers at Masjid-i-Noor and smaller local mosques for Ramazan, fostering a sense of belonging and peaceful coexistence. Hundreds a...

item.title: NCB arrests two in dark web drug network, seizes ₹5 crore of LSD, MDMA and other substances
item.description: The Narcotics Control Bureau (NCB) has successfully dismantled a sophisticated dark web-based drug trafficking network, arresting two habitual offenders and seizing a substantial quantity of drugs com...

item.title: Betty Yee Maintains Campaign for California Governor Amid Crowded Democratic Field
item.description: Betty Yee, former California state controller, continues her campaign for governor despite trailing in polls and fundraising. She emphasizes practical fiscal management, accountability, and hands-on e...

item.title: SSS 3 Students Face Delays and Challenges During WAEC Biometric Registration in Rivers State
item.description: Plenty Senior Secondary School 3 (SSS3) students for Rivers State don dey complain say dem dey face gbege for the ongoing WAEC biometric capturing exercise wey na requirement for the 2025/2026 WASSCE....

item.title: Ian Huntley Reflects on Life Sentence in Prison Recordings Prior to Death
item.description: Haunting audio recordings from 2002 reveal that Ian Huntley, the Soham child killer, was aware he would never leave prison alive. Huntley, who murdered ten-year-old schoolgirls Holly Wells and Jessica...

item.title: Kim Kardashian uses spray tan techniques to enhance her figure
item.description: Kim Kardashian, the reality television star and business entrepreneur, is celebrated for her striking figure. While she maintains a rigorous diet and exercise routine, including regular weightlifting ...

item.title: FIR Registered in Mandi Bahauddin Hospital Sexual Assault Case Involving Minor Girl
item.description: In Mandi Bahauddin, Punjab Police have registered an FIR following the alleged sexual assault of a 15-year-old girl at a private hospital near King Chowk. The incident took place when the victim visit...

item.title: Demonstrations in Cyprus demand closure of British military bases amid heightened regional tensions
item.description: Hundreds of demonstrators marched through Nicosia, the capital of Cyprus, calling for the United Kingdom to close its two sovereign military bases on the island, Akrotiri and Dhekelia. The protests, o...

item.title: Iran Prepares for Selection of New Supreme Leader After Khamenei’s Death
item.description: Following the assassination of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in US-Israeli strikes, Iran’s clerical leadership is moving quickly to appoint a new supreme leader. The Islamic Republic’s theocratic system, est...

item.title: Pwani Oil Co-Founder's Son Rajan Malde Passes Away at 48, Cremation Scheduled
item.description: Nairobi: Rajan Rameshchandra Malde, son of the late Rameshchandra Kanji Malde and nephew of Nareshchandra Malde, both co-founders of Pwani Oil, has passed away at 48. His death occurred on Friday, Mar...

item.title: Tinubu Hails Ndoma-Egba on 70th Birthday for Distinguished Public Service
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don felicitates former Senate Leader, Senator Victor Ndoma-Egba, as e celebrate him 70th birthday. For statement wey e Special Adviser on Information and Strategy, Bayo Ona...

item.title: Higher Education Helpdesk Addresses Over 55 000 Student Enquiries in South Africa
item.description: Since its establishment in August 2024, the Higher Education and Training Helpdesk in South Africa has successfully managed over 57 000 student and stakeholder queries, resolving around 55 000, achiev...

item.title: Iran's Assembly of Experts reaches decision on new supreme leader amid ongoing conflict
item.description: Iran’s Assembly of Experts, the 88-member clerical body tasked with appointing the country’s supreme leader, has declared that it has chosen a successor to the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, although th...

item.title: Balancing Canadian Multiculturalism with Concerns About Extremist Activism
item.description: Former B.C. premier and federal cabinet minister Ujjal Dosanjh, a Sikh who immigrated to Canada in 1968, has voiced concerns over the rise of extremist Sikh activism within Canada advocating for a sep...

item.title: Cultivating AI Responsiveness and Balance in Teaching During Lent
item.description: The article reflects on the growing role of artificial intelligence (AI) in education and encourages teachers to shift from being defensive or blindly enthusiastic to being AI-responsive. Being AI-res...

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan announce private and business trip to Australia
item.description: Prince Harry and Meghan, the Duke and Duchess of Sussex, are set to visit Australia next month, marking their first trip to the country in nearly eight years. Their itinerary will include stops in Syd...

item.title: Zanzibar 2VP Appreciates NMB Bank's Support to Orphans and Community During Ramadan
item.description: In Zanzibar, the Second Vice-President, Alhajj Hemed Suleiman Abdulla, praised NMB Bank for organising Iftar dinners that unite customers, stakeholders, and orphans during the holy month of Ramadan. H...

item.title: Iran announces election of new supreme leader amid escalating war with US and Israel
item.description: Iran has reportedly elected a new supreme leader to succeed Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in an Israeli airstrike last Saturday, as confirmed by a senior official from the Assembly of Experts...

item.title: Reflecting on Adam Smith's 'The Wealth of Nations' 250 Years Later
item.description: Monday, March 9, 2026, marks the 250th anniversary of Adam Smith's seminal work, 'An Inquiry into the Nature and Causes of the Wealth of Nations.' Robert Dimand highlights how, even after a quarter of...

item.title: Comprehensive Report on the Escalating Iran-Israel Conflict and Regional Impacts
item.description: A major conflict has erupted in West Asia following a joint U.S.-Israel military operation targeting Iran on February 28, 2026. The initial strikes, which included attacks on key Iranian cities such a...
